software.name: RixelHK
software.description_en: RixelHK is an application designed to help users quickly download and install various games. It offers a wide range of game resources with one-click download and automatic installation features, streamlining the game download process. Users can browse by game category for a more seamless and personalized gaming experience.
software.description_zh: RixelHK 是一款帮助用户快速下载、安装各类游戏的应用程序。它提供丰富的游戏资源支持一键下载和自动安装，简化了游戏下载过程。用户可以按游戏类型进行分类查找，为用户提供更流畅和个性化的游戏体验。
software.author: RixelHK
software.changelog_zh: 支持 H700 Linux 设备

software.name: Tiny Scraper
software.description_en: Game ROM media scraper, auto-download screenshots.
software.description_zh: 游戏ROM媒体刮削器，自动下载截图。
software.author: G.R.H

software.name: Web Manager
software.description_en: The Web Game Manager turns your Anbernic device into a web‑based ROM management center. You can browse, upload, delete, and preview games from any computer, phone, or tablet on the same Wi‑Fi network – no need to eject the SD card.
software.description_zh: 网络游戏管理器将您的Anbernic设备变成基于网络的ROM管理中心。您可以在同一Wi-Fi网络上的任何计算机、手机或平板电脑上浏览、上传、删除和预览游戏，无需弹出SD卡。
software.author: G.R.H
software.instruction_zh: 请到 应用中心 中运行。
software.instruction_en: Please run it in App Center.

software.name: ROCreader
software.description_en: A comic reader suitable for Anbernic RGds devices.
software.description_zh: 一款漫画阅读器，适用于 Anbernic RGds 设备。
software.author: Blood_roc
